raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 3,
    "R1.3": 1,
    "R1.6": 3,
    "RX.1": 1,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 1,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "Identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix: the contribution is not clearly stated.",
    "R1.3": "Does not check claim-evidence linkage; flags at least one claim the evidence does not support (comparable to or somewhat better than previous studies).",
    "R1.6": "Improves a few problem paragraphs, but could benefit from further polish.",
    "RX.1": "All output presented as equally confident.",
    "RX.3": "Output covers a substantially different active set than requested (missing disclosure of cohort provenance and ethics, tool versions, reference build, variant caller(s) upstream, code and data availability).",
    "RX.4": "Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (unsupported claims about performance and robustness).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.8,
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: Identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix: the contribution is not clearly stated.
rationale.R1.3: Does not check claim-evidence linkage; flags at least one claim the evidence does not support (comparable to or somewhat better than previous studies).
rationale.R1.6: Improves a few problem paragraphs, but could benefit from further polish.
rationale.RX.1: All output presented as equally confident.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers a substantially different active set than requested (missing disclosure of cohort provenance and ethics, tool versions, reference build, variant caller(s) upstream, code and data availability).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (unsupported claims about performance and robustness).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
